Appearances:
Plaintiff Gordon Property Management, is present. Represented by Stephanie Gordon.
Attorney, Daniel Stern, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Rami Krikoria, is present.
Attorney, Carolyn Gold, representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Nils Rosenquest, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 304B, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
This case settled, the trial date of OCT-25-2010 is vacated.
